subject: fix(ui): extract shared PageDots, harden oklchToHex, add tests
body:
Extracted PageDots.jsx from ContextBar to eliminate duplicated page
thumbnails in LayoutTab that were missing hex validation, ARIA
attributes, and WCAG 44px touch targets. Both consumers now use
the same validated, accessible component.

Extracted oklchToHex to scripts/oklchToHex.mjs with hardened regex
(optional hue for achromatic colors, alpha channel syntax, extra
whitespace). Added 16 unit tests covering reference values, edge
cases, and invalid input.

Tags: pwa, themes, a11y, security, test
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theming
Semver: patch
